/usr/bin/ar qc libfysics.a CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/paganin.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/denoise.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/rings.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/mask.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/clahe.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/glcae.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/process.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/stream.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/guided.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/musica.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/fsc.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/zdrift.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/sheetness.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/noise.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/register.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/phasecorr.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/compact.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/fuse.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/diffusion.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/spectral.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/texture.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/zarr_io.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/calibrate.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics.dir/pipeline.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfysics.a
